exploration_notes: Four key files handle raw SQL and SQL injection prevention in Django: (1) django/db/models/expressions.py contains the RawSQL expression class which accepts pre-parameterized SQL and params, passing them through as_sql() to the compiler for safe parameterized execution. (2) django/db/models/query.py contains both the QuerySet.raw() method and the RawQuerySet class that bind user-supplied params to raw queries via parameter substitution.
